package rulecoverage

func PositiveSqlStringConcat() string {
    ruleID := "sql_string_concat"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Query execution calls where SQL is constructed dynamically with concatenation or fmt.Sprintf."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
